title: Immersive Fluids
description: A minecraft mod that makes water finite and simulates its flow.
body:
### Now also on FORGE

This mod makes it so water follows a discrete level-based fluid simulation.
Many more features and performance improvements to come in the future.

The mod is a fork of Dihydrogen Monoxide (DHMO), but completely revamped, with more advanced simulation logic, and significant efforts put towards optimisation.

![Water draining from one container into another ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f5bdc48c94095cebb82df7423bb0a3451fc549.jpeg)
